languages.text: [Ударить Эоганна] "Знай свое место, убогий червь! Ты оскорбил гения!"
[Strike Eogunn] "Know your place, you wretched worm! You have insulted a genius!"
languages.original_text: [Ударить Эоганна] "Знай свое место, убогий червь! Ты оскорбил гения!"

traits.locale_text: [Strike Eogunn] "Know your place, you wretched worm! You have insulted a genius!"

languages.text: [Eogunn schlagen] "Was fällt Euch ein, elender Wurm! Ihr habt ein Genie beleidigt!"
languages.original_text: [Strike Eogunn] "Know your place, you wretched worm! You have insulted a genius!"

traits.locale_text: [Eogunn schlagen] "Was fällt Euch ein, elender Wurm! Ihr habt ein Genie beleidigt!"

languages.text: [Frapper Eogunn] « Restez à votre place, misérable vermine ! Vous venez d'insulter un génie ! »
languages.original_text: [Strike Eogunn] "Know your place, you wretched worm! You have insulted a genius!"

traits.locale_text: [Frapper Eogunn] « Restez à votre place, misérable vermine ! Vous venez d'insulter un génie ! »

languages.text: [Golpear a Eogunn] «¡Acepta tu lugar, gusano miserable! ¡Has insultado a un genio!».
languages.original_text: [Strike Eogunn] "Know your place, you wretched worm! You have insulted a genius!"

traits.locale_text: [Golpear a Eogunn] «¡Acepta tu lugar, gusano miserable! ¡Has insultado a un genio!».

languages.text: [Eogunn'a vur] "Haddini bil sefil solucan! Bir dâhiye hakaret ediyorsun!"
languages.original_text: [Strike Eogunn] "Know your place, you wretched worm! You have insulted a genius!"

traits.locale_text: [Eogunn'a vur] "Haddini bil sefil solucan! Bir dâhiye hakaret ediyorsun!"

languages.text: 【攻击伊奥贡】“认清你的地位，卑劣的蛆虫！你竟敢侮辱一位天才！”
languages.original_text: [Strike Eogunn] "Know your place, you wretched worm! You have insulted a genius!"

traits.locale_text: 【攻击伊奥贡】“认清你的地位，卑劣的蛆虫！你竟敢侮辱一位天才！”

languages.text: ［エオガンを打つ］「身の程を知れ、この惨めな虫けらが！ 貴様は天才を侮辱したのだぞ！」
languages.original_text: [Strike Eogunn] "Know your place, you wretched worm! You have insulted a genius!"

traits.locale_text: ［エオガンを打つ］「身の程を知れ、この惨めな虫けらが！ 貴様は天才を侮辱したのだぞ！」
